additionalBenefits: Zero foreign currency markup - best for international spends
10% value back on travel via Scapia app

faqs.question: What is Scapia?
faqs.answer: Scapia is a travel-focused fintech that partners with Federal Bank to issue credit cards. They offer a travel booking platform where cardholders earn enhanced rewards.

faqs.question: Is the zero FX markup really zero?
faqs.answer: Yes, there is absolutely no foreign currency markup on international transactions, making it one of very few cards in India offering this benefit, especially on a free card.

faqs.question: Will there ever be an annual fee?
faqs.answer: Scapia positions this as a lifetime free card with no joining, annual, or renewal fees. However, terms can change - check the latest offer details.

faqs.question: How do Scapia Coins work?
faqs.answer: 1 Scapia Coin equals ₹1. You earn coins on all spends (1% base, 10% on Scapia travel). Coins can be used for future travel bookings on the Scapia app or as statement credits.
